settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Most orders ship within 1–2 business days and arrive in 3–6 business days within the US. You'll get a tracking link by email the moment your order ships.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Yes! We ship to over 30 countries. International delivery typically takes 7–14 business days, and any duties or taxes are calculated at checkout — no surprise fees at the door.

settings.question: Can I change or cancel my order?
settings.answer: We start prepping orders quickly, so reach out within 2 hours of ordering and we'll do our best to change or cancel it. After that, our team can't guarantee a change before it ships.

settings.question: What's your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer free returns and exchanges within 30 days of delivery, as long as the piece is unworn and in its original packaging. Refunds are issued to your original payment method within 5–7 business days.

settings.question: My piece arrived damaged — what now?
settings.answer: So sorry! Email our team with a photo and your order number within 7 days of delivery, and we'll send a free replacement or refund, no return needed.

settings.question: What are your pieces made of?
settings.answer: Our jewelry is crafted from brass and stainless-steel bases with 14k gold plating or rhodium (white gold look) plating — nickel-free and designed to be gentle on sensitive skin.

settings.question: Will it tarnish or turn my skin green?
settings.answer: Our plating is layered thicker than typical fast-fashion jewelry, and every piece is nickel-free, so it resists tarnish and discoloration far longer. For best results, avoid perfume, lotion, and swimming pools.

settings.question: Is your jewelry waterproof?
settings.answer: Our pieces are splash- and sweat-resistant for everyday wear, but we recommend removing jewelry before swimming, showering, or hot tubs to keep the shine going longer.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Klarna for pay-in-4 installments at checkout.

settings.question: Do you offer discounts for first-time customers?
settings.answer: Yes — sign up for our email list and get 15% off your first order, sent straight to your inbox.
